title: polypodium lepidopteris var. rufulum
intro: Polypodium lepidopteris var. rufulum, also known as the red-stemmed polypody fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Polypodium lepidopteris var. rufulum include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as potentially treating conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
